speaker: speaker1
text: We are looking for a bilingual secretary . Do you think you are proficient in both written and spoken English ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think my English is fairly good . As you can see from my CV , I graduated from university with a B . A . degree in English . I studied the English language and English literature systematically .

speaker: speaker1
text: How are your typing and shorthand skills ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I can type 80 words a minute , basically no mistake , and can take dictation in English at 120 words per minute .
